name: Chicken Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Grease an 8x8 inch casserole dish with cooking spray or a small amount of butter.
3. Tear the biscuits into small pieces and distribute them evenly on the bottom of the prepared dish.
4. Arrange the cubed chicken over the biscuit pieces.
5. Mix the cream of chicken soup with 1 can (12 oz) of milk until smooth.
6. Pour the soup mixture over the chicken in the casserole dish.
7. Bake for 30 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through and the biscuits are golden brown.
8. Remove from the oven and sprinkle cheese over the top. You may use a small amount or up to half of the total cheese called for in the recipe, depending on your preference.
9. Return the dish to the oven and bake for an additional 10 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
This family favorite is easy enough for kids to help prepare.
